AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit routing rationale enumerating why not decisions.md (no commitment) and why not followups.md (user only asked to flag); ISO-dated header used.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: Daybook references observations.md and followups.md by name but without anchor links to the specific entry; resolution works at the file level only.

AR4.justification: Append to observations.md and creation of a per-date daybook file are both idempotent-friendly; nothing would conflict on re-run.
